lesson.menu_desc: Full day at the SP office -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 15 -- Review: SP Integration
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Anna Flávia Miranda da Silva | Aula 15 -- Review: SP Integration

listenings.text: Good morning, Anna, and welcome to the Sao Paulo office for the day. Here is your plan. First, you meet the team on the third floor and have a coffee. Then we have a meeting at ten. We talk about the numbers and the growth this year. After that, we go to a business lunch with a client. You order from the menu. Finally, in the afternoon, you visit the other department. It is a full day, but you speak English very well now. Have a great day.

Today was a long day at the office, but it was a good day. In the morning I met my new colleagues and the team. I had a coffee and I felt glad. In the meeting I gave my opinion. I said, I think the total is good and the growth is bigger this year. At lunch I ordered the fish dish and a water, please. At the end I asked for the bill. Now I am not nervous. I can work a full day in English. I am proud of my progress.

extra_audio.text: First, Anna arrives and meets the team on the third floor. Then she has a coffee with a new colleague. Next, in the meeting, she gives her opinion about the numbers. After that, she goes to a business lunch and orders from the menu. Finally, she visits the other department and ends a full day at the office.
